title: Addy Osmani Agent Skills
description: Production-oriented agent workflows spanning discovery, specification, implementation, review, testing, delivery, and operations.

langflow.reason: This lifecycle workflow has checkpoints, evidence requirements, and verification gates that map cleanly to a reusable Run Flow.

skills.title: API and Interface Design
skills.description: Guides stable API and interface design across endpoints, module boundaries, public contracts, and frontend/backend integration.

skills.title: Browser Testing with DevTools
skills.description: Tests and debugs browser applications with Chrome DevTools MCP using real DOM, console, network, performance, and visual evidence.

langflow.reason: The workflow needs live browser inspection through Chrome DevTools MCP; a Run Flow remains the non-MCP fallback.

skills.title: Code Review and Quality
skills.description: Performs multi-axis code review before merge and produces actionable quality findings.

skills.title: Code Simplification
skills.description: Refactors working code for clarity and maintainability without changing behavior.

skills.title: Context Engineering
skills.description: Optimizes agent rules, context setup, session starts, and task switching when output quality matters.

skills.title: Debugging and Error Recovery
skills.description: Uses systematic root-cause analysis for failing tests, broken builds, unexpected behavior, and recovery.

skills.title: Deprecation and Migration
skills.description: Plans safe deprecation, migration, compatibility, and sunset paths for old systems, APIs, and features.

skills.title: Documentation and ADRs
skills.description: Captures architectural decisions, public API changes, feature context, and durable project documentation.

skills.title: Doubt-Driven Development
skills.description: Applies fresh-context adversarial review to high-stakes or non-trivial decisions before they stand.

skills.title: Frontend UI Engineering
skills.description: Builds accessible, responsive, production-quality interfaces, components, layouts, and stateful experiences.

skills.title: Git Workflow and Versioning
skills.description: Structures commits, branches, conflict resolution, releases, semantic versions, tags, and changelogs.

skills.title: Idea Refine
skills.description: Turns vague ideas into actionable concepts through structured divergent and convergent thinking.

skills.title: Incremental Implementation
skills.description: Lands multi-file changes in small, verifiable increments instead of one large implementation step.

skills.title: Interview Me
skills.description: Extracts underlying intent from underspecified requests with a one-question-at-a-time interview.

skills.title: Observability and Instrumentation
skills.description: Adds logging, metrics, tracing, and alerting so production behavior is visible and diagnosable.

skills.title: Performance Optimization
skills.description: Measures and improves frontend, backend, query, database, and Core Web Vitals bottlenecks.

skills.title: Planning and Task Breakdown
skills.description: Breaks specifications and clear requirements into ordered, scoped, and parallelizable tasks.

skills.title: Security and Hardening
skills.description: Hardens input handling, authentication, storage, sessions, and third-party integrations against vulnerabilities.

skills.title: Shipping and Launch
skills.description: Prepares production releases with readiness checks, monitoring, staged rollout, and rollback planning.

skills.title: Source-Driven Development
skills.description: Grounds implementation decisions in current official documentation and source-cited evidence.

skills.title: Spec-Driven Development
skills.description: Creates a clear specification before coding a new project, feature, or significant change.

skills.title: Test-Driven Development
skills.description: Drives new behavior, fixes, and logic changes through tests that prove the outcome.
